title: Role definition
description: Normalized role definition consumed by lifecycle scripts. One file per role, derived from the per-department snapshots in this directory. All access (including M365 license SKUs via group-based licensing) is modeled as AD security or distribution group membership; no separate license or Entra-group fields.

schemaVersion.description: Schema contract version. Bump on any breaking change.

displayName.description: Human-readable role name (typically the canonical JobTitle).

department.description: Department slug derived from the source snapshot file.

notes.description: Free-text notes (exceptions, rationale for manual edits, etc.).

source.description: Provenance metadata. Tells reviewers where the entitlements came from and how they were merged.

mergeStrategy.description: How per-user template entitlements were combined into the role.

entitlements.description: Canonical AD group memberships granted by the role. M365 license SKUs are conferred indirectly via group-based licensing on entries in securityGroups; do not enumerate them separately.

securityGroups.description: AD security group DNs granted by the role.

distributionGroups.description: AD distribution group DNs granted by the role.

variance.description: Items present in some but not all source template users. Surfaces disagreement that the merge strategy dropped or kept; reviewers should reconcile.
